estimated_runtime: 4-10 hours for disk cache generation and three 100-epoch approximately 4M-parameter MLP fits on one A6000; the watcher is authoritative
claim_scope: second fixed-key PRESENT r3 confirmation of eight seed0-preregistered true ciphertext output bits; total plaintext/ciphertext rows, not samples per class; not full-ciphertext recovery, broad cross-key statistics, r4 evidence, or SOTA
launch_policy: Launch only from an explicit pushed commit in a clean run-owned clone under G:\lxy through cmd.exe /c on physical GPU0; keep disk cache, progress, checkpoints, logs, results, and curated archive under G:\lxy; require 24 result rows, valid protocol and execution checks, a verified result branch, and local tmux retrieval.
